description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden cabinet with a dark, polished finish. The upper section features three open shelves, ideal for displaying books, decorative items, or storing everyday objects. The lower section consists of a pair of paneled doors with small round handles, providing enclosed storage space. The cabinet has a classic, slightly ornate design with crown molding at the top and base, and subtle decorative trim along the edges. The sides and back are solid wood, with no visible openings or glass panels. The overall construction suggests durability and a traditional aesthetic suitable for urban interiors, such as offices, libraries, or residential spaces.
description: A tall, dark wood cabinet with three open shelves above and two paneled doors below, featuring classic trim and a polished finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves and two paneled doors with handles at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel with decorative trim and no visible openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid wood back with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with solid wood and decorative trim.
